shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/hello-world-api-1.0.0.jar &
JAVA_PID=$!
echo "Java PID: $JAVA_PID"
sleep 5
# Test without name param
echo "=== Test 1: no name param ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/ 
echo ""
# Test with name param
echo "=== Test 2: with name param ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"
echo ""
# Test with whitespace name
echo "=== Test 3: whitespace name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"
echo ""
# Test with empty name
echo "=== Test 4: empty name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name="
echo ""
kill $JAVA_PID 2>/dev/null
wait $JAVA_PID 2>/dev/null
echo "=== Server stopped ==="
